MASHSHIELDER-NP_CHARGE_POWER.title: NP Charge
MASHSHIELDER-NP_CHARGE_POWER.description: #Energy for Mash's Noble Phantasm, up to a maximum of 300. The ult manifests at 100; NP cards consume the gauge when played.
MASHSHIELDER-NP_CHARGE_POWER.smartDescri: #Energy for Mash's Noble Phantasm, up to a maximum of 300. The ult manifests at 100; NP cards consume the gauge when played.
MASHSHIELDER-BULWARK_POWER.title: Bulwark
MASHSHIELDER-BULWARK_POWER.description: #Block up to this amount is not removed at the start of your turn.
MASHSHIELDER-BULWARK_POWER.smartDescript: #Block up to this amount is not removed at the start of your turn.
MASHSHIELDER-SHIELDER_FORM_POWER.title: Shielder Form
MASHSHIELDER-SHIELDER_FORM_POWER.descrip: #End your turn with 8 or more Block: gain 5 NP Charge. Your first Block card each turn grants 3 additional Block.
MASHSHIELDER-SHIELDER_FORM_POWER.smartDe: #End your turn with 8 or more Block: gain 5 NP Charge. Your first Block card each turn grants 3 additional Block.
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_FORM_POWER.title: Ortinax Form
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_FORM_POWER.descript: #Your Attacks consume up to 5 of your Block and deal that much additional damage. Your defense cards grant 1 less Block.
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_FORM_POWER.smartDes: #Your Attacks consume up to 5 of your Block and deal that much additional damage. Your defense cards grant 1 less Block.
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_FORM_POWER.title: Paladin Form
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_FORM_POWER.descript: #The Shielder and Ortinax passives combined, with no defense penalty. Permanent.
MASHSHIELDER-PALADIN_FORM_POWER.smartDes: #The Shielder and Ortinax passives combined, with no defense penalty. Permanent.
MASHSHIELDER-INTERCEPT_POWER.title: Intercept
MASHSHIELDER-INTERCEPT_POWER.description: #When an enemy's attack fails to get through your Block, the attacker takes this much damage.
MASHSHIELDER-INTERCEPT_POWER.smartDescri: #When an enemy's attack fails to get through your Block, the attacker takes this much damage.
MASHSHIELDER-PROVOKE_POWER.title: Intercept (1 turn)
MASHSHIELDER-PROVOKE_POWER.description: #When an enemy's attack fails to get through your Block, the attacker takes this much damage. Expires at the end of the round.
MASHSHIELDER-PROVOKE_POWER.smartDescript: #When an enemy's attack fails to get through your Block, the attacker takes this much damage. Expires at the end of the round.
MASHSHIELDER-FORM_SHIFTED_POWER.title: Form Shifted
MASHSHIELDER-MOBILE_WALL_POWER.title: Mobile Wall
MASHSHIELDER-MOBILE_WALL_POWER.descripti: #Your next Attack this turn deals this much additional damage.
MASHSHIELDER-MOBILE_WALL_POWER.smartDesc: #Your next Attack this turn deals this much additional damage.
MASHSHIELDER-DEFENSIVE_FORMATION_POWER.d: #This turn, your Block-gaining cards are played twice.
MASHSHIELDER-DEFENSIVE_FORMATION_POWER.s: #This turn, your Block-gaining cards are played twice.
MASHSHIELDER-IRON_WILL_POWER.title: Iron Will
MASHSHIELDER-IRON_WILL_POWER.description: #At the end of your turn, gain this much Bulwark Block.
MASHSHIELDER-IRON_WILL_POWER.smartDescri: #At the end of your turn, gain this much Bulwark Block.
MASHSHIELDER-WALL_DOCTRINE_POWER.title: Wall Doctrine
MASHSHIELDER-WALL_DOCTRINE_POWER.descrip: #Your first Block card each turn grants this much NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-WALL_DOCTRINE_POWER.smartDe: #Your first Block card each turn grants this much NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-CONCEPTUAL_AMMO_POWER.title: Conceptual Ammunition
MASHSHIELDER-CONCEPTUAL_AMMO_POWER.descr: #Up to this many times per turn, your Attacks remove one buff from the enemy hit before the damage resolves.
MASHSHIELDER-CONCEPTUAL_AMMO_POWER.smart: #Up to this many times per turn, your Attacks remove one buff from the enemy hit before the damage resolves.
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_SERVOS_POWER.title: Ortinax Servomotors
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_SERVOS_POWER.descri: #At the end of your turn, if you played 2 or more Attacks: gain this much Block and 10 NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_SERVOS_POWER.smartD: #At the end of your turn, if you played 2 or more Attacks: gain this much Block and 10 NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-CHALDEA_LIBRARY_POWER.title: Chaldea Library
MASHSHIELDER-CHALDEA_LIBRARY_POWER.descr: #Draw this many additional cards each turn.
MASHSHIELDER-CHALDEA_LIBRARY_POWER.smart: #Draw this many additional cards each turn.
MASHSHIELDER-DEMI_SERVANT_POWER.title: Demi-Servant
MASHSHIELDER-DEMI_SERVANT_POWER.descript: #At the start of your turn, gain this much Bulwark Block.
MASHSHIELDER-DEMI_SERVANT_POWER.smartDes: #At the start of your turn, gain this much Bulwark Block.
MASHSHIELDER-HOMUNCULUS_HEART_POWER.desc: #Whenever you change form: draw cards and gain NP Charge. Max 2 times per turn.
MASHSHIELDER-HOMUNCULUS_HEART_POWER.smar: #Whenever you change form: draw cards and gain NP Charge. Max 2 times per turn.
MASHSHIELDER-SENPAI_PROMISE_POWER.title: Promise to Senpai
MASHSHIELDER-SENPAI_PROMISE_POWER.descri: #When an enemy hit fails to get through your Block: gain this much NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-SENPAI_PROMISE_POWER.smartD: #When an enemy hit fails to get through your Block: gain this much NP Charge.
#The first NP card you play each combat costs no NP Charge and resolves at minimum Overcharge. Whenever you play an NP card: gain this many Critical Stars.
#The first NP card you play each combat costs no NP Charge and resolves at minimum Overcharge. Whenever you play an NP card: gain this many Critical Stars.
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_MIRACLE_POWER.title: Fou's Miracle
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_MIRACLE_POWER.descripti: #The first time you would die this combat: survive at this much HP, gain 25 Block and 50 NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_MIRACLE_POWER.smartDesc: #The first time you would die this combat: survive at this much HP, gain 25 Block and 50 NP Charge.
MASHSHIELDER-ABSOLUTE_WALL_POWER.title: Absolute Wall
MASHSHIELDER-ABSOLUTE_WALL_POWER.descrip: #Until your next turn, your HP cannot be reduced. Hits stopped by this effect count as fully blocked.
MASHSHIELDER-ABSOLUTE_WALL_POWER.smartDe: #Until your next turn, your HP cannot be reduced. Hits stopped by this effect count as fully blocked.
MASHSHIELDER-COVER_POWER.title: Cover
MASHSHIELDER-COVER_POWER.description: #Until your next turn, damage that pierces your allies' defenses is taken by Mash instead.
MASHSHIELDER-COVER_POWER.smartDescriptio: #Until your next turn, damage that pierces your allies' defenses is taken by Mash instead.
MASHSHIELDER-CAMELOT_MANIFESTED_POWER.de: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Absolute Bulwark already opened. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
MASHSHIELDER-CAMELOT_MANIFESTED_POWER.sm: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Absolute Bulwark already opened. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
MASHSHIELDER-BOND_POWER.title: Bond
MASHSHIELDER-BOND_POWER.description: #Mash's Bond level this run. Grants bonuses at the start of each combat (see the Bond Gauge relic).
MASHSHIELDER-BOND_POWER.smartDescription: #Mash's Bond level this run. Grants bonuses at the start of each combat (see the Bond Gauge relic).
MASHSHIELDER-COMBAT_ANALYSIS_POWER.title: Combat Analysis
MASHSHIELDER-COMBAT_ANALYSIS_POWER.descr: #At the start of your turn: gain *Critical *Stars equal to this power. Whenever you gain *Critical *Ready: draw 1 card.
MASHSHIELDER-COMBAT_ANALYSIS_POWER.smart: #At the start of your turn: gain *Critical *Stars equal to this power. Whenever you gain *Critical *Ready: draw 1 card.
